text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
260 
PRE_ICL_APPLY 
LABEL: 
How Part D Pre-ICL Cost-Sharing is applied 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates how the plan charges cost-sharing before reaching the Initial Coverage Limit 
(ICL). 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_APPLY 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
1 = Medicare-Defined Part D Coinsurance Amount 

2 = Cost Share Tiers 

3 = No Cost
